programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: An American mining engineer (Billy Zane, "Titanic") gets involved in a civil war and international conspiracy in Africa. Featuring Robert Downey Jr.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An ex-F.B.I. Agent (Tommy Lee Jones) and an ex-mob lawyer in the Witness Protection Program (Morgan Freeman) have to put aside their petty rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: The Air I Breathe [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A drama based on an ancient Chinese proverb that breaks life down into four emotional cornerstones: happiness, pleasure, sorrow and love.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stopped
programme.desc: Hundreds of massive intergalactic robots appear in all of the major world capitals with an ultimatum: Prove the value of human civilization or be destroyed.

programme.title: The Terminators
programme.desc: A small-town lawman (A Martinez) leads the fight for survival when a military defense network sends its army of deadly cyborgs on a mission to wipe out humanity.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: When a freak hurricane swamps Los Angeles, thousands of sharks terrorize the waterlogged populace, and nature's deadliest killer rules sea, land, and air.

programme.title: Planet of the Sharks
programme.desc: In the future, glacial melting has covered 98% of earth. Sharks dominate the planet, led by a mutated alpha shark, as human survivors live in terror.

programme.title: The 6th Friend
programme.desc: Six college best friends throw their own private graduation party that goes terribly wrong when an uninvited guest arrives. Five years later, the girls gather once again and endure a night of far more horror and bloodshed.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: In this "FLASHBACK MOVIE," the old crew meet a feral kid who leads them to Mercy Laboratories, a mysterious compound of survivors awaiting the return of "The Man," a villain of the Apocalypse who carries around a list of soon-to-disappear people.

programme.title: Battledogs
programme.desc: In the tradition of UNDERWORLD and DISTRICT 9, all of Manhattan is quarantined when the Lupine virus spreads like wildfire, turning innocent civilians into ravenous wolves. Nothing short of a nuclear blast can stop the monstrous virus.

programme.title: Planetquake
programme.desc: A tectonic shift causes a series of ever-escalating earthquakes. A team of leading seismologists must stop the disaster before it breaks apart the Earth.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: From the Jules Verne classic, a hi-tech drilling rig must rescue a research team trapped deep below the Earth's surface. There they discover an exotic world -- rich with spectacular flora and fantastical creatures.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm
programme.desc: Rumpelstiltskin destroys a magic mirror to create a portal to Earth, taking for fairytale princesses along with him. The princesses use their martial and magical powers to battle the trickster and his army of thralls to save the planet.

programme.title: Znation
programme.desc: Skeezy and Sketchy re-enact Doc's stories of the Founding Fathers. Warren and the others search for the bizkit bakery and the secret ingredient in them.

programme.title: Snakes on a Train
programme.desc: Under a Mayan Curse, snakes are hatched inside a young woman, devouring her from within. With hours for her to live, she jumps on a train to Los Angeles to find a shaman, trapping the passengers aboard

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On July 4, 1987, seven inmates broke out of a high-security prison in New Mexico. The daring escape was orchestrated by convicted murderer William Wayne Gilbert, who was serving a life sentence.

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.desc: Two robbers with assault rifles ambushed an armored car, killing both guards and seizing thousands of dollars.
